name: authoring-skills
tagline: Reference guide for authoring and structuring agent skills in .agents/skills/, covering frontmatter fields, description writing, and.
verdict: Clear, example-rich reference doc with decidable criteria for what belongs in a skill vs AGENTS.md. Main gaps: no negative-trigger/exclusion guidance despite overlap risk with adjacent skill-authoring tools, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion guidance anywhere despite overlap risk with adjacent skill-authoring tools (whole doc, lines 1-117).
No version field or changelog anywhere in the skill (line 1).
